title: Stone++
description: A simple lil addon that adds new ores, tools, and blocks.
body:
# **STONE++**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0ab55T9_ty0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Made with MCreator because i'm new here😅**

https://sites.google.com/view/stoneplusplus/home **Informational Website**

Release 0.1.7



Adds a small amount of ores and weapons which make the gameplay a bit more fun.

# **Adds a bit of of new ores, such as:**

- Silver

- Ruby

- Plutonium

- Cinnibar

- Lithium

![Revamped Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e01dc3254e15926d044f1d6c0e542d64264ea594_0.webp)

# **Also with some weapons!**

- Powered bow - Shoots TNT

- Fire gun - Shoots fire charges

- Drill

Weapons have limited uses, but you can fix that by making a reloader, which reloads the weapons. Put the weapon on the left slot, and the stuff you will reload with on the second slot. For example, you put a Fire gun on the left slot, and you put fire charges on the right slot.

# **New TNT Types:**

- Plutonium TNT

- Nuke

Since these TNT's are radioactive due to plutonium, you get a new effect; either radioactive poisoning or nuke poisoning! I know, nuke poisoning is a stupid name, but go with it. Plutonium ore, sadly, doesn't give this effect. It's in alpha alright?

# **Other stuff?:**

- Lithium Block - I wouldn't submerge it in water, something explosive will happen..

- Teleporter - A Bit too OP, Teleport to wherever coordinates you like!
(except it doesn't work without cheats)
- Decontamination shower - Simply removes any effect you have upon right clicking

- Reloader

- Crusher - Crushes Cinnabar Gems into Vermillion Dust.

- Freezer - Freezes Sulfur Dioxide for a Bucket of Mercury.

- Floor Manager - A Elevator that teleports you beetween floors.

- Drill - A Big industrial drill about as good as a diamond pickaxe and is slightly cheaper.

- Informational Stone - A Talking piece of stone, when right clicked, gives instructions to most of the stuff in this description, and a lot more things that isn't here!

- Blender - Blend some fruits, some give special effects when touched!

# **Also:**

Plutonium is long lasting fuel!

There is a new structure, a simple building with a reloader and a decontamination shower! Make it a house if you'd like!

A Bucket of Mercury, when touched, gives poison and nausea.

We'd hope you'd enjoy my first mod; Stone++!

**Oh yeah -- I Forgot. Armorers and Weaponsmiths have special trades; trading with rubies, just like before! There is also another proffesion called a Miner; Their workspace being a Reloader.**

**Surviving?** Use this starter seed! (The mod version needs to be 1.4 or newer to work properly.) 
-224749126961879989

- Includes A Abandoned Laboratory, Village, And A Miner's house right next to spawn.
